Package com.platform.user_service.configs

Class OpenApiConfig

java.lang.Object
com.platform.user_service.configs.OpenApiConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer
@Configuration public class OpenApiConfig extends Object implements org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer
Configuration class for OpenAPI settings.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    configureContentNegotiation(org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.ContentNegotiationConfigurer configurer)
    Configures content negotiation to use 'application/json' as the default content type.
    org.springframework.http.converter.json.MappingJackson2HttpMessageConverter
    octetStreamJsonConverter()
    Configures a custom MappingJackson2HttpMessageConverter to handle requests and responses with the media type 'application/octet-stream'.

  • Method Details

    • octetStreamJsonConverter

      @Bean public org.springframework.http.converter.json.MappingJackson2HttpMessageConverter octetStreamJsonConverter()
      Configures a custom MappingJackson2HttpMessageConverter to handle requests and responses with the media type 'application/octet-stream'.
      Returns:
      MappingJackson2HttpMessageConverter A message converter supporting 'application/octet-stream'.

    • configureContentNegotiation

      public void configureContentNegotiation(org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.ContentNegotiationConfigurer configurer)
      Configures content negotiation to use 'application/json' as the default content type.
      Specified by:
      configureContentNegotiation in interface org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer
      Parameters:
      configurer - ContentNegotiationConfigurer
